description: After audit-009 addressed the top 10 scripts, 41 lower-volume scripts still use only Write-Host with no Write-AppLog. Lower priority than audit-009 targets. Scripts include: PS-CheatSheet-EXAMPLES-V2 (206 WH), PS-CheatSheet-EXAMPLES (61 WH), Invoke-SandboxSmokeTest (28 WH), XHTML-Invoke-AutomatedTests (21 WH), SINGovernance.psm1 (21 WH), and 36 others.
title: Add Write-AppLog to remaining 41 Write-Host-only scripts
